// Prefix all IDs in an SVG string with a unique per-step prefix
// This prevents clip path ID clashes across multiple step SVGs
function prefixSVGIds(svgHtml, prefix) {
  var p = prefix + '-';
  // Prefix element IDs
  var result = svgHtml.replace(/\bid="([^"]+)"/g, function(m, id) {
    return 'id="' + p + id + '"';
  });
  // Prefix url(#xxx) references
  result = result.replace(/url\(#([^)]+)\)/g, function(m, id) {
    return 'url(#' + p + id + ')';
  });
  // Prefix href="#xxx" references
  result = result.replace(/href="#([^"]+)"/g, function(m, id) {
    return 'href="#' + p + id + '"';
  });
  // Scope CSS class names in <style> blocks to avoid cross-SVG conflicts
  // Replace .className { with .p-className { and class="className" with class="p-className"
  result = result.replace(/<style[^>]*>(.*?)<\/style>/gs, function(styleBlock, css) {
    // Prefix each CSS class selector
    var prefixedCSS = css.replace(/\.(\w+)\s*\{/g, function(m, cls) {
      return '.' + p + cls + ' {';
    });
    return '<style>' + prefixedCSS + '</style>';
  });
  // Prefix class attributes to match the new CSS selectors
  result = result.replace(/\bclass="([^"]+)"/g, function(m, classes) {
    var prefixed = classes.split(/\s+/).map(function(c) {
      return c ? p + c : c;
    }).join(' ');
    return 'class="' + prefixed + '"';
  });
  return result;
}


// Font list - add new fonts here when ready

var FONTS = [

function selectSize(size) {
  S.padSize = size;
  ['S','M','L'].forEach(function(s) {
    var btn = document.getElementById('size-' + s);
    if(btn) btn.className = 'size-btn' + (s === size ? ' sel' : '');
  });
}
function scrollDesigns(dir) {
  var el = document.getElementById('design-scroll');
  if(el) el.scrollLeft += dir * 160;
}
function scrollFonts(dir, gridId) {
  var el = document.getElementById(gridId || 'font-grid');
  if(el) el.scrollLeft += dir * 130;
}
function buildFontGrid(target) {
  target = target || 'name';
  var gridId = target === 'num' ? 'num-font-grid' : 'font-grid';
  var g = document.getElementById(gridId);
  if(!g) return;
  g.innerHTML = '';
  var currentFont = target === 'num' ? S.numFontFamily : S.nameFontFamily;
  FONTS.forEach(function(f) {
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'font-card' + (currentFont === f.family ? ' sel' : '');
    card.onclick = function() {
      if(target === 'num') S.numFontFamily = f.family;
      else S.nameFontFamily = f.family;
      buildFontGrid(target); syncAll();
    };
    var prev = document.createElement('div');
    prev.className = 'font-preview';
    prev.style.fontFamily = f.family;
    prev.textContent = f.preview;
    var name = document.createElement('div');
    name.className = 'font-name';
    name.textContent = f.label;
    card.appendChild(prev);
    card.appendChild(name);
    g.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// DESIGN CATALOGUE
// type: 'pattern' or 'graphic'
// drawBG: function(ctx, bgCol, patCol) draws background layer
// Each design uses the same base SVG structure
// When real SVG assets are ready, replace drawBG with image loader
// ============================================================

var DESIGN_CATALOGUE = [
  // --- PATTERNS ---
  {
    id: 'vanguard', label: 'Vanguard', type: 'pattern',

      // Uses the loaded BG_INNER_TEMPLATE - handled separately
      return 'loaded';
    }

var currentDesignTab = 'pattern';

function switchDesignTab(tab) {
  currentDesignTab = tab;
  document.getElementById('dtab-pattern').className = 'design-tab' + (tab==='pattern' ? ' active' : '');
  document.getElementById('dtab-graphic').className = 'design-tab' + (tab==='graphic'  ? ' active' : '');
  buildDesignGallery();
}

// Generate SVG thumbnail for a design
function makeDesignThumb(design, bgCol, patCol) {
  var ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
  var svg = document.createElementNS(ns, 'svg');
  svg.setAttribute('viewBox', '0 0 200 200');
  svg.setAttribute('width', '100%');

  // Pad shape clip
  var defs = document.createElementNS(ns, 'defs');
  var cp = document.createElementNS(ns, 'clipPath');
  cp.id = 'thumb-clip-' + design.id;
  var rect = document.createElementNS(ns, 'rect');
  rect.setAttribute('x','10'); rect.setAttribute('y','10');
  rect.setAttribute('width','180'); rect.setAttribute('height','180');
  rect.setAttribute('rx','30');
  cp.appendChild(rect);
  defs.appendChild(cp);
  svg.appendChild(defs);

  var g = document.createElementNS(ns, 'g');
  g.setAttribute('clip-path', 'url(#thumb-clip-' + design.id + ')');

  // Background
  var bg = document.createElementNS(ns, 'rect');
  bg.setAttribute('x','0'); bg.setAttribute('y','0');
  bg.setAttribute('width','200'); bg.setAttribute('height','200');
  bg.setAttribute('fill', bgCol);
  g.appendChild(bg);

  // Pattern overlay based on design type
  drawDesignPattern(g, design.id, patCol, ns);

  svg.appendChild(g);
  return svg;
}

function drawDesignPattern(g, id, col, ns) {
  if(id === 'vanguard') {
    // Represents the Vanguard splash pattern
    var splash = document.createElementNS(ns, 'path');
    splash.setAttribute('d', 'M0,90 Q30,70 60,85 Q90,100 120,80 Q150,60 200,75 L200,130 Q160,115 120,125 Q80,135 40,120 Q15,110 0,125 Z');
    splash.setAttribute('fill', col);
    splash.setAttribute('opacity', '0.85');
    g.appendChild(splash);
  } else if(id === 'chevron') {
    [60,90,120].forEach(function(y) {
      var pl = document.createElementNS(ns, 'polyline');
      pl.setAttribute('points', '0,'+y+' 100,'+(y-30)+' 200,'+y);
      pl.setAttribute('fill','none'); pl.setAttribute('stroke',col);
      pl.setAttribute('stroke-width','12'); pl.setAttribute('opacity','0.7');
      g.appendChild(pl);
    });
  } else if(id === 'stripes') {
    [-20,20,60,100,140,180].forEach(function(x) {
      var l = document.createElementNS(ns, 'line');
      l.setAttribute('x1',x); l.setAttribute('y1','0');
      l.setAttribute('x2',x+60); l.setAttribute('y2','200');
      l.setAttribute('stroke',col); l.setAttribute('stroke-width','18');
      l.setAttribute('opacity','0.6');
      g.appendChild(l);
    });
  } else if(id === 'diamonds') {
    [[100,60],[60,100],[140,100],[100,140]].forEach(function(p) {
      var poly = document.createElementNS(ns, 'polygon');
      poly.setAttribute('points', p[0]+','+(p[1]-25)+' '+(p[0]+25)+','+p[1]+' '+p[0]+','+(p[1]+25)+' '+(p[0]-25)+','+p[1]);
      poly.setAttribute('fill',col); poly.setAttribute('opacity','0.7');
      g.appendChild(poly);
    });
  } else if(id === 'halftone') {
    for(var r=0;r<5;r++) for(var c=0;c<5;c++) {
      var circle = document.createElementNS(ns, 'circle');
      circle.setAttribute('cx', 20+c*40+(r%2)*20);
      circle.setAttribute('cy', 20+r*40);
      circle.setAttribute('r', 8+r*1.5);
      circle.setAttribute('fill',col); circle.setAttribute('opacity','0.65');
      g.appendChild(circle);
    }
  } else if(id === 'waves') {
    [50,90,130,170].forEach(function(y) {
      var path = document.createElementNS(ns, 'path');
      path.setAttribute('d','M0,'+y+' Q50,'+(y-20)+' 100,'+y+' Q150,'+(y+20)+' 200,'+y);
      path.setAttribute('fill','none'); path.setAttribute('stroke',col);
      path.setAttribute('stroke-width','8'); path.setAttribute('opacity','0.65');
      g.appendChild(path);
    });
  } else if(id === 'flames') {
    var flame = document.createElementNS(ns, 'path');
    flame.setAttribute('d','M40,200 C40,160 20,140 35,110 C50,80 45,60 60,40 C65,70 55,85 70,100 C75,75 80,55 100,30 C105,65 90,80 105,105 C115,80 120,60 140,40 C142,75 125,90 135,115 C148,140 140,165 160,200 Z');
    flame.setAttribute('fill',col); flame.setAttribute('opacity','0.8');
    g.appendChild(flame);
  } else if(id === 'camo') {
    var blobs = [
      'M20,20 Q50,10 70,30 Q90,50 60,60 Q30,70 15,50 Z',
      'M100,15 Q130,5 150,25 Q170,45 145,58 Q120,70 100,50 Z',
      'M30,90 Q60,75 85,90 Q100,105 80,120 Q55,135 30,120 Z',
      'M120,85 Q155,70 170,90 Q185,110 165,125 Q140,140 115,120 Z',
      'M50,150 Q80,135 105,150 Q120,165 100,178 Q70,190 45,175 Z',
      'M140,145 Q165,130 185,148 Q200,165 180,178 Q155,192 135,175 Z',
    ];
    blobs.forEach(function(d) {
      var blob = document.createElementNS(ns, 'path');
      blob.setAttribute('d', d);
      blob.setAttribute('fill', col); blob.setAttribute('opacity','0.55');
      g.appendChild(blob);
    });
  } else if(id === 'lightning') {
    var bolt = document.createElementNS(ns, 'polygon');
    bolt.setAttribute('points','120,10 80,100 110,100 80,190 140,85 105,85');
    bolt.setAttribute('fill',col); bolt.setAttribute('opacity','0.85');
    g.appendChild(bolt);
  } else if(id === 'splatter') {
    [[60,60,30],[140,50,22],[40,130,25],[150,140,18],[100,100,15],[80,80,8],[120,120,10]].forEach(function(s) {
      var sp = document.createElementNS(ns, 'circle');
      sp.setAttribute('cx',s[0]); sp.setAttribute('cy',s[1]); sp.setAttribute('r',s[2]);
      sp.setAttribute('fill',col); sp.setAttribute('opacity','0.7');
      g.appendChild(sp);
      // splatter drips
      var drip = document.createElementNS(ns, 'ellipse');
      drip.setAttribute('cx',s[0]+5); drip.setAttribute('cy',s[1]+s[2]+8);
      drip.setAttribute('rx',4); drip.setAttribute('ry',8);
      drip.setAttribute('fill',col); drip.setAttribute('opacity','0.5');
      g.appendChild(drip);
    });
  } else if(id === 'geometric') {
    var pts = [[100,20],[180,60],[180,140],[100,180],[20,140],[20,60]];
    var hex = document.createElementNS(ns, 'polygon');
    hex.setAttribute('points', pts.map(function(p){return p[0]+','+p[1];}).join(' '));
    hex.setAttribute('fill','none'); hex.setAttribute('stroke',col);
    hex.setAttribute('stroke-width','8'); hex.setAttribute('opacity','0.7');
    g.appendChild(hex);
    var hex2 = document.createElementNS(ns, 'polygon');
    var pts2 = [[100,45],[155,72],[155,128],[100,155],[45,128],[45,72]];
    hex2.setAttribute('points', pts2.map(function(p){return p[0]+','+p[1];}).join(' '));
    hex2.setAttribute('fill',col); hex2.setAttribute('opacity','0.3');
    g.appendChild(hex2);
    // cross lines
    pts.forEach(function(p) {
      var ln = document.createElementNS(ns, 'line');
      ln.setAttribute('x1',100); ln.setAttribute('y1',100);
      ln.setAttribute('x2',p[0]); ln.setAttribute('y2',p[1]);
      ln.setAttribute('stroke',col); ln.setAttribute('stroke-width','3');
      ln.setAttribute('opacity','0.4');
      g.appendChild(ln);
    });
  } else if(id === 'galaxy') {
    // Radial gradient stars effect
    for(var i=0;i<30;i++) {
      var star = document.createElementNS(ns, 'circle');
      var cx = 20+Math.abs(Math.sin(i*137)*160);
      var cy = 20+Math.abs(Math.cos(i*137)*160);
      var r  = 1+Math.abs(Math.sin(i*47))*4;
      star.setAttribute('cx',cx); star.setAttribute('cy',cy); star.setAttribute('r',r);
      star.setAttribute('fill',col); star.setAttribute('opacity', 0.3+Math.abs(Math.sin(i))*0.7);
      g.appendChild(star);
    }
    var swirl = document.createElementNS(ns, 'path');
    swirl.setAttribute('d','M100,100 Q130,70 160,100 Q130,130 100,100 Q70,70 40,100 Q70,130 100,100');
    swirl.setAttribute('fill','none'); swirl.setAttribute('stroke',col);
    swirl.setAttribute('stroke-width','6'); swirl.setAttribute('opacity','0.5');
    g.appendChild(swirl);
  }
}


// All designs - patterns and graphics in one scrollable row
// Add your real thumbnail images as src when ready

var ALL_DESIGNS = [];

async function loadDesigns() {
    var cfg = window.BespokeConfig || {};
    var ajaxUrl = cfg.ajaxUrl || '/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php';
    var productType = cfg.productType || 'shinpads';
    try {
        var res = await fetch(ajaxUrl + '?action=bespoke_get_designs&product_type=' + encodeURIComponent(productType));
        var json = await res.json();
        if (json.success && Array.isArray(json.data) && json.data.length > 0) {
            ALL_DESIGNS = json.data.map(function(d) {
                return { id: String(d.id), label: d.name, thumb: d.thumb_url, svg: d.svg_url, layers: d.layers || [] };
            });
        }
    } catch(e) {
        console.error('[BEspoke] Failed to load designs:', e);
    }
    buildDesignScroll();
    if (ALL_DESIGNS.length > 0) {
        S.design = ALL_DESIGNS[0].id;
        buildDesignScroll();
        updateDesignLayers();
        syncAll();
    }
}

function buildDesignScroll() {
  var scroll = document.getElementById('design-scroll');
  if(!scroll) return;
  scroll.innerHTML = '';
  ALL_DESIGNS.forEach(function(d) {
    var item = document.createElement('div');
    item.className = 'design-thumb' + (S.design === d.id ? ' sel' : '');
   item.onclick = function() {
    S.design = d.id;
    buildDesignScroll();
    buildColourZones(d.id);
    updateDesignLayers();
    syncAll();
};

    // Use real thumbnail image
    if(d.thumb) {
      var img = document.createElement('img');
      img.src = d.thumb;
      img.alt = d.label;
      img.style.cssText = 'width:100%;display:block;aspect-ratio:1;object-fit:cover;';
      item.appendChild(img);
    }

    var lbl = document.createElement('div');
    lbl.className = 'dt-lbl';
    lbl.textContent = d.label;
    item.appendChild(lbl);
    scroll.appendChild(item);
  });
}

function buildDesignGallery() {
  var g = document.getElementById('design-gallery');
  if(!g) return;
  g.innerHTML = '';
  var filtered = DESIGN_CATALOGUE.filter(function(d){ return d.type === currentDesignTab; });
  filtered.forEach(function(d) {
    var item = document.createElement('div');
    item.className = 'design-item' + (S.design === d.id ? ' sel' : '');
    item.onclick = function() { S.design = d.id; buildDesignGallery(); updateDesignLayers(); syncAll(); };
    var thumb = makeDesignThumb(d, S.bgColor, S.patColor);
    item.appendChild(thumb);
    var lbl = document.createElement('div');
    lbl.className = 'di-label'; lbl.textContent = d.label;
    item.appendChild(lbl);
    g.appendChild(item);
  });
}

// Update the bg layer when design changes
// For now, non-Vanguard designs use generated SVG patterns
// When real assets arrive, this function loads them
function updateDesignLayers() {
  Object.keys(previews).forEach(function(stepId) {
    var svg = previews[stepId];
    if(!svg) return;
    var bgLayer = document.getElementById('bg-layer-' + stepId);
    if(!bgLayer) return;

    if(S.design === 'vanguard') {
      // Use the real Vanguard SVG
      bgLayer.innerHTML = prefixSVGIds(BG_INNER_TEMPLATE, 's' + stepId);
      bgLayer.style.setProperty('--bg-col', S.bgColor);
      bgLayer.style.setProperty('--pat-col', S.patColor);
    } else {
      // Generate SVG pattern for placeholder designs
      var ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
      bgLayer.innerHTML = '';
      bgLayer.style.removeProperty('--bg-col');
      bgLayer.style.removeProperty('--pat-col');

      // Draw two pad shapes with the pattern
      [[110,600,'left'],[640,600,'right']].forEach(function(pad) {
        var padG = document.createElementNS(ns, 'g');

        // Pad background fill
        var bg = document.createElementNS(ns, 'rect');
        bg.setAttribute('x', pad[0]); bg.setAttribute('y', '55');
        bg.setAttribute('width', '380'); bg.setAttribute('height', '1060');
        bg.setAttribute('rx', '80'); bg.setAttribute('fill', S.bgColor);
        padG.appendChild(bg);

        // Pattern layer
        var patG = document.createElementNS(ns, 'g');
        // Scale the 200x200 thumb pattern to fit the 380x1060 pad
        patG.setAttribute('transform', 'translate('+pad[0]+',55) scale('+380/200+','+1060/200+')');
        drawDesignPattern(patG, S.design, S.patColor, ns);
        padG.appendChild(patG);

        // Clip to pad shape
        var clipId = 'padclip-' + pad[2] + '-s' + stepId + '-' + S.design;
        var defs = document.createElementNS(ns, 'defs');
        var cp = document.createElementNS(ns, 'clipPath');
        cp.id = clipId;
        var clipRect = document.createElementNS(ns, 'rect');
        clipRect.setAttribute('x',pad[0]); clipRect.setAttribute('y','55');
        clipRect.setAttribute('width','380'); clipRect.setAttribute('height','1060');
        clipRect.setAttribute('rx','80');
        cp.appendChild(clipRect);
        defs.appendChild(cp);
        bgLayer.appendChild(defs);

        padG.setAttribute('clip-path', 'url(#'+clipId+')');
        bgLayer.appendChild(padG);
      });
    }
  });
}

function makeSVG(stepId) {
  var ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
  var svg = document.createElementNS(ns,'svg');
  svg.setAttribute('class','preview');
  svg.setAttribute('viewBox','0 0 1200 1200');
  svg.setAttribute('xmlns',ns);
  svg.style.cssText = 'display:block;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:6px;';

  // Background layer - prefix IDs uniquely per step to avoid ID clashes
  var bgGroup = document.createElementNS(ns,'g');
  bgGroup.id = 'bg-layer-'+stepId;
  bgGroup.style.setProperty('--bg-col', S.bgColor);
  bgGroup.style.setProperty('--pat-col', S.patColor);
  // Use unique prefix per step so clip path IDs don't clash
  bgGroup.innerHTML = prefixSVGIds(BG_INNER_TEMPLATE, 's'+stepId);
  svg.appendChild(bgGroup);

  // Overlay layer (for future additional designs)
  var overlayLayer = document.createElementNS(ns,'g');
  overlayLayer.id = 'overlay-layer-'+stepId;
  svg.appendChild(overlayLayer);

  // Badge layer
  var badgeLayer = document.createElementNS(ns,'g');
  badgeLayer.id = 'badge-layer-'+stepId;
  svg.appendChild(badgeLayer);

  // Text layer
  var textLayer = document.createElementNS(ns,'g');
  textLayer.id = 'text-layer-'+stepId;
  svg.appendChild(textLayer);

  previews[stepId] = svg;
  document.getElementById('pb'+stepId).appendChild(svg);
  updatePreview(stepId);
  setupDrag(svg, stepId);
  return svg;
}

function updatePreview(stepId) {
  var svg = previews[stepId];
  if(!svg) return;
  var ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';

  // Update colours
  var bgLayer = document.getElementById('bg-layer-'+stepId);
  if(bgLayer) {
    bgLayer.style.setProperty('--bg-col', S.bgColor);
    bgLayer.style.setProperty('--pat-col', S.patColor);
  }

  // Badge layer
  var bl = document.getElementById('badge-layer-'+stepId);
  if(bl) {
    bl.innerHTML = '';
    if(S.badgeURL) {
      var hs = S.badgeSize/2;
      [{key:'badgeL',x:S.pos.badgeL.x,y:S.pos.badgeL.y},
       {key:'badgeR',x:S.pos.badgeR.x,y:S.pos.badgeR.y}
      ].forEach(function(item){
        var g = document.createElementNS(ns,'g');
        g.setAttribute('class','draggable');
        g.setAttribute('data-drag',item.key);
        g.setAttribute('transform','translate('+item.x+','+item.y+')');
        var img = document.createElementNS(ns,'image');
        img.setAttribute('href',S.badgeURL);
        img.setAttribute('x',-hs); img.setAttribute('y',-hs);
        img.setAttribute('width',S.badgeSize); img.setAttribute('height',S.badgeSize);
        img.setAttribute('preserveAspectRatio','xMidYMid meet');
        g.appendChild(img);
        bl.appendChild(g);
      });
    }
  }

  // Text layer
  var tl = document.getElementById('text-layer-'+stepId);
  if(tl) {
    tl.innerHTML = '';
    var items = [
      {key:'nameL', x:S.pos.nameL.x, y:S.pos.nameL.y, txt:S.nameL, size:S.nameSize, col:S.nameColor, sw:Math.max(8,S.nameSize*0.12),  font:S.nameFontFamily},
      {key:'nameR', x:S.pos.nameR.x, y:S.pos.nameR.y, txt:S.nameR, size:S.nameSize, col:S.nameColor, sw:Math.max(8,S.nameSize*0.12),  font:S.nameFontFamily},
      {key:'numL',  x:S.pos.numL.x,  y:S.pos.numL.y,  txt:S.numL,  size:S.numSize,  col:S.numColor,  sw:Math.max(10,S.numSize*0.1), font:S.numFontFamily},
      {key:'numR',  x:S.pos.numR.x,  y:S.pos.numR.y,  txt:S.numR,  size:S.numSize,  col:S.numColor,  sw:Math.max(10,S.numSize*0.1), font:S.numFontFamily}
    ];
    items.forEach(function(item){
      if(!item.txt) return;
      var g = document.createElementNS(ns,'g');
      g.setAttribute('class','draggable');
      g.setAttribute('data-drag',item.key);
      g.setAttribute('transform','translate('+item.x+','+item.y+')');
      var t = document.createElementNS(ns,'text');
      t.setAttribute('text-anchor','middle');
      t.setAttribute('dominant-baseline','middle');
      t.setAttribute('font-size',item.size);
      t.setAttribute('font-weight','900');
      t.setAttribute('font-family', item.font);
      t.setAttribute('fill',item.col);
      t.setAttribute('stroke','rgba(0,0,0,0.65)');
      t.setAttribute('stroke-width',item.sw);
      t.setAttribute('stroke-linejoin','round');
      t.setAttribute('paint-order','stroke');
      t.textContent = item.txt;
      g.appendChild(t);
      tl.appendChild(g);
    });
  }
}

function setupDrag(svg, stepId) {
  var dragging=null, startSVG, startPos, pinchStart=null, pinchStartSize=null, pinchKey=null;

  function svgPt(clientX, clientY) {
    var r = svg.getBoundingClientRect();
    return {x:(clientX-r.left)*1200/r.width, y:(clientY-r.top)*1200/r.height};
  }

  svg.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){
    var t = e.target.closest('.draggable'); if(!t) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    dragging = t.getAttribute('data-drag');
    startSVG = svgPt(e.clientX, e.clientY);
    startPos = {x:S.pos[dragging].x, y:S.pos[dragging].y};
  });
  window.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e){
    if(!dragging) return;
    var pt = svgPt(e.clientX, e.clientY);
    S.pos[dragging].x = Math.round(startPos.x + pt.x - startSVG.x);
    S.pos[dragging].y = Math.round(startPos.y + pt.y - startSVG.y);
    syncAll();
  });
  window.addEventListener('mouseup', function(){ dragging=null; });

  // Touch drag
  svg.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e){
    if(e.touches.length===1){
      var t = e.target.closest('.draggable'); if(!t) return;
      e.preventDefault();
      dragging = t.getAttribute('data-drag');
      startSVG = svgPt(e.touches[0].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY);
      startPos = {x:S.pos[dragging].x, y:S.pos[dragging].y};
    } else if(e.touches.length===2) {
      // Pinch to resize badge/text
      e.preventDefault();
      var dx = e.touches[0].clientX - e.touches[1].clientX;
      var dy = e.touches[0].clientY - e.touches[1].clientY;
      pinchStart = Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);
      // Determine what we're pinching based on last dragged
      if(dragging && dragging.startsWith('badge')) { pinchKey='badge'; pinchStartSize=S.badgeSize; }
      else if(dragging && dragging.startsWith('name')) { pinchKey='name'; pinchStartSize=S.nameSize; }
      else if(dragging && dragging.startsWith('num')) { pinchKey='num'; pinchStartSize=S.numSize; }
    }
  },{passive:false});

  svg.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    if(e.touches.length===1 && dragging){
      var pt = svgPt(e.touches[0].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY);
      S.pos[dragging].x = Math.round(startPos.x + pt.x - startSVG.x);
      S.pos[dragging].y = Math.round(startPos.y + pt.y - startSVG.y);
      syncAll();
    } else if(e.touches.length===2 && pinchStart && pinchKey){
      var dx = e.touches[0].clientX-e.touches[1].clientX;
      var dy = e.touches[0].clientY-e.touches[1].clientY;
      var dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);
      var ratio = dist/pinchStart;
      if(pinchKey==='badge'){ S.badgeSize=Math.round(Math.max(80,Math.min(320,pinchStartSize*ratio))); document.getElementById('badge-size-slider').value=S.badgeSize; document.getElementById('badge-size-val').textContent=S.badgeSize; }
      if(pinchKey==='name') { S.nameSize=Math.round(Math.max(40,Math.min(140,pinchStartSize*ratio))); document.getElementById('name-size-slider').value=S.nameSize; document.getElementById('name-size-val').textContent=S.nameSize; }
      if(pinchKey==='num')  { S.numSize=Math.round(Math.max(60,Math.min(220,pinchStartSize*ratio))); document.getElementById('num-size-slider').value=S.numSize; document.getElementById('num-size-val').textContent=S.numSize; }
      syncAll();
    }
  },{passive:false});

  svg.addEventListener('touchend', function(){ dragging=null; pinchStart=null; });

  // Scroll wheel to resize when hovering over draggable
  svg.addEventListener('wheel', function(e){
    var t = e.target.closest('.draggable'); if(!t) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    var key = t.getAttribute('data-drag');
    var delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? -5 : 5;
    if(key.startsWith('badge')){ S.badgeSize=Math.max(80,Math.min(320,S.badgeSize+delta*4)); document.getElementById('badge-size-slider').value=S.badgeSize; document.getElementById('badge-size-val').textContent=S.badgeSize; }
    if(key.startsWith('name')) { S.nameSize=Math.max(40,Math.min(140,S.nameSize+delta*2)); document.getElementById('name-size-slider').value=S.nameSize; document.getElementById('name-size-val').textContent=S.nameSize; }
    if(key.startsWith('num'))  { S.numSize=Math.max(60,Math.min(220,S.numSize+delta*3)); document.getElementById('num-size-slider').value=S.numSize; document.getElementById('num-size-val').textContent=S.numSize; }
    syncAll();
  },{passive:false});
}

function syncAll(){ Object.keys(previews).forEach(function(k){updatePreview(parseInt(k));}); }

function goTo(n){
  document.getElementById('s'+S.step).classList.remove('active');
  var newScreen = document.getElementById('s'+n);
  newScreen.classList.add('active');
  S.step=n;
  for(var i=0;i<5;i++){var l=document.getElementById('lbl-'+i);if(!l)continue;l.className='sl';if(i<n)l.classList.add('done');if(i===n)l.classList.add('active');}
  document.getElementById('prog').style.width=PROG[n]+'%';
  if(n<6 && !previews[n]) makeSVG(n);
if(n===1) buildFontGrid("name");
if(n===2) buildFontGrid("num");
if(n===3) buildDesignScroll();
  if(n===5) fillSummary();
  syncAll();
  // Reset scroll: on desktop scroll the panel; on mobile scroll the page to the frame top
  if(window.innerWidth >= 768){
    newScreen.scrollTop = 0;
  } else {
    var frame = document.querySelector('.frame');
    if(frame){ frame.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); }
  }
}

function onBadgeSize(v){S.badgeSize=parseInt(v);document.getElementById('badge-size-val').textContent=v;syncAll();}
function onNameSize(v){S.nameSize=parseInt(v);document.getElementById('name-size-val').textContent=v;syncAll();}
function onNumSize(v){S.numSize=parseInt(v);document.getElementById('num-size-val').textContent=v;syncAll();}
function toggleSameName(){
  S.sameName=!S.sameName;
  document.getElementById('name-tog').className='tog-track'+(S.sameName?' on':'');
  document.getElementById('name-same-block').style.display=S.sameName?'block':'none';
  document.getElementById('name-split-block').style.display=S.sameName?'none':'block';
  if(!S.sameName){
    // Pre-populate both split inputs with current value
    var cur = document.getElementById('name-both').value || S.nameL || '';
    var inL = document.getElementById('name-L');
    var inR = document.getElementById('name-R');
    if(inL && !inL.value) { inL.value = cur; S.nameL = cur.toUpperCase(); document.getElementById('nLc').textContent=cur.length; }
    if(inR && !inR.value) { inR.value = ''; S.nameR = ''; document.getElementById('nRc').textContent='0'; }
  } else {
    // Going back to same - use left pad value
    var combined = S.nameL || '';
    document.getElementById('name-both').value = combined;
    document.getElementById('nbc').textContent = combined.length;
    S.nameL = combined; S.nameR = combined;
  }
  syncAll();
}
function toggleSameNum(){
  S.sameNum=!S.sameNum;
  document.getElementById('num-tog').className='tog-track'+(S.sameNum?' on':'');
  document.getElementById('num-same-block').style.display=S.sameNum?'block':'none';
  document.getElementById('num-split-block').style.display=S.sameNum?'none':'block';
  if(!S.sameNum){
    var cur = document.getElementById('num-both').value || S.numL || '';
    var inL = document.getElementById('num-L');
    var inR = document.getElementById('num-R');
    if(inL && !inL.value) { inL.value = cur; S.numL = cur; }
    if(inR && !inR.value) { inR.value = ''; S.numR = ''; }
  } else {
    var combined = S.numL || '';
    document.getElementById('num-both').value = combined;
    S.numL = combined; S.numR = combined;
  }
  syncAll();
}
function switchNT(s){document.getElementById('ntL').className='pad-tab'+(s==='L'?' active':'');document.getElementById('ntR').className='pad-tab'+(s==='R'?' active':'');document.getElementById('nLb').style.display=s==='L'?'block':'none';document.getElementById('nRb').style.display=s==='R'?'block':'none';}
function switchNT2(s){document.getElementById('nt2L').className='pad-tab'+(s==='L'?' active':'');document.getElementById('nt2R').className='pad-tab'+(s==='R'?' active':'');document.getElementById('n2Lb').style.display=s==='L'?'block':'none';document.getElementById('n2Rb').style.display=s==='R'?'block':'none';}
function onNameBoth(){var v=document.getElementById('name-both').value.toUpperCase();document.getElementById('name-both').value=v;document.getElementById('nbc').textContent=v.length;S.nameL=v;S.nameR=v;syncAll();}
function onNameSplit(side){var v=document.getElementById('name-'+side).value.toUpperCase();document.getElementById('name-'+side).value=v;document.getElementById('n'+side+'c').textContent=v.length;if(side==='L')S.nameL=v;else S.nameR=v;syncAll();}
function onNumBoth(){var v=document.getElementById('num-both').value;S.numL=v;S.numR=v;syncAll();}
function onNumSplit(s){var v=document.getElementById('num-'+s).value;if(s==='L')S.numL=v;else S.numR=v;syncAll();}

// Debounce wrapper for colour picker - prevents lag on drag
var _colorDebounceTimer = null;
function debouncedColor(zone, val) {
  // Update swatch immediately (cheap DOM op - no lag)
  if(zone==='bg')  document.getElementById('ct-bg').style.background=val;
  if(zone==='pat') document.getElementById('ct-pat').style.background=val;
  if(zone==='name')document.getElementById('ct-name').style.background=val;
  if(zone==='num') document.getElementById('ct-num').style.background=val;
  // Debounce the expensive SVG re-render to 40ms after last move
  clearTimeout(_colorDebounceTimer);
  _colorDebounceTimer = setTimeout(function(){ onColor(zone, val); }, 40);
}
function onColor(zone,val){
  if(zone==='bg'){S.bgColor=val;document.getElementById('ct-bg').style.background=val;}
  if(zone==='pat'){S.patColor=val;document.getElementById('ct-pat').style.background=val;}
  if(zone==='name'){S.nameColor=val;document.getElementById('ct-name').style.background=val;}
  if(zone==='num'){S.numColor=val;document.getElementById('ct-num').style.background=val;}
  buildDesignScroll();
  updateDesignLayers();
  syncAll();
}
function handleBadge(e){
  var file=e.target.files[0];if(!file)return;
  S.badge=file.name; S.badgeURL=URL.createObjectURL(file);
  document.getElementById('badge-fname').textContent=file.name;
  document.getElementById('badge-thumb').src=S.badgeURL;
  document.getElementById('badge-row').style.display='flex';
  document.getElementById('upload-zone').style.display='none';
  syncAll();
}
function removeBadge(){S.badge=null;S.badgeURL=null;document.getElementById('badge-file').value='';document.getElementById('badge-row').style.display='none';document.getElementById('upload-zone').style.display='block';syncAll();}
// buildDesignGrid replaced by buildDesignGallery
function fillSummary(){
  var d=DESIGN_CATALOGUE.find(function(x){return x.id===S.design;});
  var sizeLabels = {S:'S (Age 5-8)', M:'M (Age 9-13)', L:'L (Age 14+)'};
  document.getElementById('sum-size').textContent = sizeLabels[S.padSize] || S.padSize;
  var sizeLabels = {S:'S (Age 5-8)', M:'M (Age 9-13)', L:'L (Age 14+)'};
  document.getElementById('sum-size').textContent = sizeLabels[S.padSize] || S.padSize;
  document.getElementById('sum-design').textContent=d?d.label:'—';
  var nameFont = FONTS.find(function(f){return f.family===S.nameFontFamily;});
  var numFont  = FONTS.find(function(f){return f.family===S.numFontFamily;});
  document.getElementById('sum-name-font').textContent = nameFont ? nameFont.label : S.nameFontFamily;
  document.getElementById('sum-num-font').textContent  = numFont  ? numFont.label  : S.numFontFamily;
  document.getElementById('sum-badge').textContent=S.badge||'Not added';
  S.orderNotes = document.getElementById('order-notes').value;
  var notesRow = document.getElementById('sum-notes-row');
  if(notesRow) { notesRow.style.display = S.orderNotes ? 'flex' : 'none'; }
  var notesEl = document.getElementById('sum-notes');
  if(notesEl) notesEl.textContent = S.orderNotes;
  document.getElementById('sum-nL').textContent=S.nameL||'—';
  document.getElementById('sum-nR').textContent=S.nameR||'—';
  document.getElementById('sum-nuL').textContent=S.numL||'—';
  document.getElementById('sum-nuR').textContent=S.numR||'—';
  var cols=[S.bgColor,S.patColor,S.nameColor,S.numColor];
  ['bg','pat','nt','nu'].forEach(function(k,i){document.getElementById('sd-'+k).style.background=cols[i];document.getElementById('sh-'+k).textContent=cols[i];});
}
function reset(){
  S={step:0,bgColor:'#feef00',patColor:'#211d33',nameColor:'#FFFFFF',numColor:'#FFFFFF',nameL:'',nameR:'',numL:'',numR:'',sameName:true,sameNum:true,badge:null,badgeURL:null,design:'vanguard',padSize:"M",orderNotes:"",badgeSize:210,nameSize:90,numSize:155,nameFontFamily:'"Arial Black", Arial, sans-serif',numFontFamily:'"Arial Black", Arial, sans-serif',pos:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEF))};
  previews={};
  for(var i=0;i<6;i++){var pb=document.getElementById('pb'+i);if(pb)pb.innerHTML='';}
  document.getElementById('s6').classList.remove('active');
  goTo(0);
}

makeSVG(0);

setupDesktop();



// ============================================================
// DESKTOP LAYOUT
// ============================================================
var IS_DESKTOP = window.innerWidth >= 768;
var DT_SVG = null; // dedicated desktop SVG element

var DT_LABELS = ['Badge','Name','Number','Design','Colours','Review','Done'];
var DT_HINTS  = [
  'Drag badge · Slider to resize',
  'Drag name · Slider to resize',
  'Drag number · Slider to resize',
  'Click a design to select',
  'Use colour pickers to customise',
  'Review your order',
  ''
];

function buildDesktopSVG() {
  var wrap = document.getElementById('dt-svg-wrap');
  if(!wrap) return null;

  var ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
  var svg = document.createElementNS(ns, 'svg');
  svg.setAttribute('viewBox', '0 0 1200 1200');
  svg.style.cssText = 'display:block;border-radius:14px;';

  // Background layer
  var bgG = document.createElementNS(ns, 'g');
  bgG.id = 'bg-layer-dt';
  bgG.style.setProperty('--bg-col', S.bgColor);
  bgG.style.setProperty('--pat-col', S.patColor);
  bgG.innerHTML = prefixSVGIds(BG_INNER_TEMPLATE, 'sdt');
  svg.appendChild(bgG);

  // Other layers
  ['overlay-layer-dt','badge-layer-dt','text-layer-dt'].forEach(function(layerId) {
    var g = document.createElementNS(ns, 'g');
    g.id = layerId;
    svg.appendChild(g);
  });

  wrap.innerHTML = '';
  wrap.appendChild(svg);

  // Register in previews so updatePreview works on it
  previews['dt'] = svg;
  setupDrag(svg, 'dt');
  return svg;
}

function setupDesktop() {
  IS_DESKTOP = window.innerWidth >= 768;
  var panel = document.getElementById('dt-panel');
  if(!panel) return;
  panel.style.display = IS_DESKTOP ? 'flex' : 'none';

  if(IS_DESKTOP && !DT_SVG) {
    // Build after a short delay to ensure BG_INNER_TEMPLATE is parsed
    setTimeout(function() {
      DT_SVG = buildDesktopSVG(); // delayed to ensure BG_INNER_TEMPLATE is ready
      if(DT_SVG) {
        updatePreview('dt');
        updateDTLabels();
      }
    }, 300);
  } else if(IS_DESKTOP) {
    updatePreview('dt');
    updateDTLabels();
  }
}

function updateDTLabels() {
  var label = document.getElementById('dt-label');
  var hint  = document.getElementById('dt-hint');
  if(label) label.textContent = DT_LABELS[S.step] || '';
  if(hint)  hint.textContent  = DT_HINTS[S.step]  || '';
}

// Patch syncAll
var _syncAll = syncAll;
syncAll = function() {
  _syncAll();
  if(IS_DESKTOP && previews['dt']) updatePreview('dt');
};

// Patch goTo  
var _goTo = goTo;
goTo = function(n) {
  _goTo(n);
  if(IS_DESKTOP) updateDTLabels();
};

window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
  var wasDesktop = IS_DESKTOP;
  IS_DESKTOP = window.innerWidth >= 768;
  if(IS_DESKTOP !== wasDesktop) setupDesktop();
});

setupDesktop();

// ============================================================
// WOOCOMMERCE INTEGRATION
// Reads config injected by WordPress (window.BespokeConfig)
// Falls back to prototype mode if not in WordPress
// ============================================================

// Captures the current SVG preview as a Blob ready for upload.
// Badge <image> elements are stripped first to avoid cross-origin issues.
// Captures the SVG preview as a Blob.
// badgeServerUrl: if a badge was uploaded, pass its server URL so it appears in the thumbnail.
// The SVG is given explicit 400x400 dimensions so browsers scale it correctly as an <img>.
function capturePreviewSVG(badgeServerUrl) {
  try {
    var svg = document.querySelector('svg.preview');
    if (!svg) return null;
    var clone = svg.cloneNode(true);

    // Force a square viewport so the thumbnail scales predictably
    clone.setAttribute('width',  '400');
    clone.setAttribute('height', '400');

    var imgs = clone.querySelectorAll('image');
    for(var i = 0; i < imgs.length; i++) {
      if(badgeServerUrl) {
        // Swap the local blob URL for the permanent server URL
        imgs[i].setAttribute('href', badgeServerUrl);
        imgs[i].setAttribute('xlink:href', badgeServerUrl);
      } else {
        // No server URL available — remove the element to avoid a broken ref
        imgs[i].parentNode.removeChild(imgs[i]);
      }
    }

    var str = new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(clone);
    return new Blob([str], {type: 'image/svg+xml'});
  } catch(e) {
    return null;
  }
}

function bespokeAddToCart() {
  var cfg = window.BespokeConfig;

  // Not in WordPress - just show success screen
  if(!cfg) {
    goTo(6);
    return;
  }

  var btn = document.querySelector('#s5 .btn-next');
  if(btn) { btn.textContent = 'Adding...'; btn.disabled = true; }

  // Step 1: Upload badge (if present)
  var badgePromise = Promise.resolve({url:'', filename:''});

  if(S.badgeURL && S.badge) {
    badgePromise = fetch(S.badgeURL)
      .then(function(r){ return r.blob(); })
      .then(function(blob) {
        var formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('action', 'bespoke_upload_badge');
        formData.append('nonce', cfg.nonce);
        formData.append('badge', blob, S.badge);
        return fetch(cfg.ajaxUrl, { method:'POST', body:formData });
      })
      .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
      .then(function(data) {
        if(data.success) return data.data;
        return {url:'', filename: S.badge};
      })
      .catch(function() { return {url:'', filename: S.badge}; });
  }

  // Step 1b: Upload SVG preview AFTER badge upload so we can embed the server URL.
  // This runs sequentially (chained) rather than in parallel.
  var combinedPromise = badgePromise.then(function(badgeData) {
    var svgBlob = capturePreviewSVG(badgeData.url);
    if(!svgBlob) return Promise.resolve({ badgeData: badgeData, previewUrl: '' });

    var previewForm = new FormData();
    previewForm.append('action',  'bespoke_upload_preview');
    previewForm.append('nonce',   cfg.nonce);
    previewForm.append('preview', svgBlob, 'preview-' + Date.now() + '.svg');

    return fetch(cfg.ajaxUrl, { method:'POST', body:previewForm })
      .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
      .then(function(data){ return { badgeData: badgeData, previewUrl: data.success ? data.data.url : '' }; })
      .catch(function(){   return { badgeData: badgeData, previewUrl: '' }; });
  });

  // Step 2: Add to cart with all design data
  combinedPromise.then(function(result) {
    var badgeData  = result.badgeData;
    var previewUrl = result.previewUrl;
    var formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('action',                'bespoke_add_to_cart');
    formData.append('nonce',                 cfg.nonce);
    formData.append('product_id',            cfg.productId);

    // Design data
    formData.append('bespoke_size',          S.padSize);
    formData.append('bespoke_design',        S.design);

    // Per-pad text
    formData.append('bespoke_name_left',     S.nameL   || '');
    formData.append('bespoke_number_left',   S.numL    || '');
    formData.append('bespoke_name_right',    S.nameR   || '');
    formData.append('bespoke_number_right',  S.numR    || '');

    // Colours
    formData.append('bespoke_colour_bg',     S.bgColor);
    formData.append('bespoke_colour_pat',    S.patColor);
    formData.append('bespoke_colour_name',   S.nameColor);
    formData.append('bespoke_colour_num',    S.numColor);

    // Fonts
    var nameFont = FONTS.find(function(f){return f.family===S.nameFontFamily;});
    var numFont  = FONTS.find(function(f){return f.family===S.numFontFamily;});
    formData.append('bespoke_font_name',     nameFont ? nameFont.label : S.nameFontFamily);
    formData.append('bespoke_font_number',   numFont  ? numFont.label  : S.numFontFamily);

    // Badge
    formData.append('bespoke_badge_url',      badgeData.url      || '');
    formData.append('bespoke_badge_filename', badgeData.filename || '');

    // Positions
    formData.append('bespoke_badge_x',       S.pos.badgeL.x);
    formData.append('bespoke_badge_y',       S.pos.badgeL.y);
    formData.append('bespoke_badge_size',    S.badgeSize);
    formData.append('bespoke_name_x',        S.pos.nameL.x);
    formData.append('bespoke_name_y',        S.pos.nameL.y);
    formData.append('bespoke_name_size',     S.nameSize);
    formData.append('bespoke_number_x',      S.pos.numL.x);
    formData.append('bespoke_number_y',      S.pos.numL.y);
    formData.append('bespoke_number_size',   S.numSize);

    // Notes
    var notesEl = document.getElementById('order-notes');
    formData.append('bespoke_notes', notesEl ? notesEl.value : '');

    // Preview thumbnail URL (captured above)
    formData.append('bespoke_preview_url', previewUrl || '');

    return fetch(cfg.ajaxUrl, { method:'POST', body:formData });
  })
  .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
  .then(function(data) {
    if(data.success) {
      // Show success then redirect to cart
      goTo(6);
      setTimeout(function() {
        window.location.href = data.data.cart_url;
      }, 2000);
    } else {
      alert('Sorry, there was a problem adding to cart: ' + (data.data || 'Please try again.'));
      if(btn) { btn.textContent = 'Add to cart'; btn.disabled = false; }
    }
  })
  .catch(function(err) {
    console.error('Add to cart error:', err);
    alert('Sorry, there was a connection problem. Please try again.');
    if(btn) { btn.textContent = 'Add to cart'; btn.disabled = false; }
  });
}

// Set price from WordPress config
// Uses DOMContentLoaded to ensure BespokeConfig has been set by WordPress before we read it
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  if(window.BespokeConfig && window.BespokeConfig.price) {
    var priceEl = document.getElementById('bespoke-price-display');
    if(priceEl) priceEl.textContent = window.BespokeConfig.price;
  }
});

</script>
</body>
</html>
